classification.included: A branch reachable by an input permitted by ISO 32000-2, OpenType 1.9.1, or one of their mandatory referenced specifications.
excluded: unknown future version or extension rejection
a value the normative specification explicitly requires consumers to ignore
an unavailable optional host capability when the format remains supported through the public injection API
WebP and AVIF APIs, which are not normative dependencies of PDF 2.0 or OpenType 1.9.1
